name: cards-stack
description: Parallel items stacked vertically, full-width cards.
purpose: Use when the items want vertical reading order — sequential exploration rather than a-glance comparison. 2–3 items work best.

cards.description: Each list item becomes one stacked card. Lead each li with **Card Title.** then body text.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: cards-stack -->

## Slide heading.

- **First card title.** Body text for the first stacked card, two short sentences max.
- **Second card title.** Body text for the second stacked card.
- **Third card title.** Body text for the third stacked card.
